description: Update the home page scroll-up navbar popup (the minimalist bar that appears when scrolling up) to show 'Fractal Collective' branding, matching the mobile menu setup. Currently the scrolled navbar is too minimal — it should include the Fractal Collective title like the mobile version does. File: src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx (scrolled home navbar variant). Depends on FRAC-83 merging first (same file).
title: Home scroll-up menu: add Fractal Collective like mobile layout
